fix_5_failure_groups.summary: Seven phase failures split into 3 STALE_PYAV_CODEC_CONTEXT_TEST_DOUBLE (F-0103_CONTEXT_ONLY) + 4 ENVIRONMENT_DEPENDENT_BACKEND_SELECTION_EXPECTATION. Not all classified as F-0103.
